name: Proximity Sensor Placement Optimization for Workcell Safety
description: A robotics safety engineer must determine the optimal mounting location for a proximity sensor that will guard a robot workcell against human intrusion. Conduct a sensor placement analysis in CoppeliaSim by evaluating a proximity sensor at five or more candidate mounting positions to identify the location that maximizes the fraction of the target detection zone covered. Save the per-placement measurement records to /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/sensor_coverage.csv and the comparison report with the recommended location to /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/sensor_analysis.json. Login: username=ga, password=password123.
